fields.label: Primary Location
fields.name: primary_location
fields.instructions: Choose the employee's primary location. This location will be displayed under their department when used on the group site or on internal directory.

fields.label: Department
fields.name: department
fields.instructions: Choose the department they should be listed under on the listings.

fields.label: Title
fields.name: title
fields.instructions: Enter the staff title, this will be positioned below their name. (ie. Sales Consultant)

fields.label: Promotion Date
fields.name: promotion_date
fields.instructions: Choose a promotion date if applies used to display in New & Promotions view.

fields.label: Start / Hire Date
fields.name: start_date
fields.instructions: Enter the employee’s Start Date, or the Original Hire Date if they are a rehire. If left blank, the publish date will be used.

fields.label: Term Date 1
fields.name: term_date_1
fields.instructions: The termination date of the first timeframe employed.

fields.label: Rehire Date 1
fields.name: rehire_date_1
fields.instructions: For rehires, keep the Start/Original Hire Date as it is and enter the Rehire Date here. If this is not a rehire, leave this field blank.

fields.label: Term Date 2
fields.name: term_date_2
fields.instructions: The termination date of the second timeframe employed.

fields.label: Rehire Date 2
fields.name: rehire_date_2
fields.instructions: For rehires, keep the Start/Original Hire Date as it is and enter the Rehire Date here. If this is not a rehire, leave this field blank.

fields.label: Term Date 3
fields.name: term_date_3
fields.instructions: The termination date of the third timeframe employed.

fields.label: Rehire Date 3
fields.name: rehire_date_3
fields.instructions: For rehires, keep the Start/Original Hire Date as it is and enter the Rehire Date here. If this is not a rehire, leave this field blank.

fields.label: Term Date 4
fields.name: term_date_4
fields.instructions: The termination date of the fourth timeframe employed.

fields.label: Rehire Date 4
fields.name: rehire_date_4
fields.instructions: For rehires, keep the Start/Original Hire Date as it is and enter the Rehire Date here. If this is not a rehire, leave this field blank.

fields.label: Term Date 5
fields.name: term_date_5
fields.instructions: The termination date of the fourth timeframe employed.

fields.label: Rehire Date 5
fields.name: rehire_date_5
fields.instructions: For rehires, keep the Start/Original Hire Date as it is and enter the Rehire Date here. If this is not a rehire, leave this field blank.

fields.label: Photo
fields.name: photo
fields.instructions: Minimum size 200x200. If no photo is uploaded a default generic photo will be used.

sub_fields.label: Add Years of Service
sub_fields.name: add_yrs_service
sub_fields.instructions:
Use this field to add previous years of service to the most recent rehire date, adjusting the anniversary date to reflect total service time.

Example: If the employee previously worked for 5 years and was rehired on 01/01/2025, the anniversary date on 01/01/2026 would show 6 years of service.

sub_fields.label: Anniversary Date (Next)
sub_fields.name: anniversary_date
sub_fields.instructions: Calculated Anniversary Date from the Start or Rehire Dates.

sub_fields.label: Anniversary Date (Last)
sub_fields.name: anniversary_date_last
sub_fields.instructions: Calculated Anniversary Date from the Start or Rehire Dates.

sub_fields.label: Years of Service - Current
sub_fields.name: years_service_current
sub_fields.instructions: Employees current years of service, calculated by the dates given.

sub_fields.label: Years of Service - Anniversary Date
sub_fields.name: years_service_on_anniversary
sub_fields.instructions: Employees current years of service, calculated by the dates given.

fields.label: Website Visible
fields.name: website_visible
fields.instructions: Choose if this staff should be listed on the individual website or not. NOTE: The staff will still be visible internally

fields.label: Website Phone
fields.name: phone
fields.instructions: Enter a number if you want a "Call/Text" button shown on the profile.

fields.label: Website Phone Type
fields.name: phone_type
fields.instructions: Choose the phone type. If mobile it will show a "TEXT" button on mobile.

fields.label: Schedule Appointment URL
fields.name: schedule_appointment_url
fields.instructions: Acuity Scheduling or other online scheduling tool. If provided it will show a "Book an Appointment" button on their profile.

fields.label: Website Listed Locations
fields.name: listed_locations
fields.instructions: Choose all the locations that this employee should be listed. (Individual location websites)

fields.label: Bio Youtube Video ID
fields.name: bio_yt_video_id
fields.instructions: Embedded video within the employee bio modal at the bottom.

fields.label: Contact Info
fields.name: office_contact_info
fields.instructions: Enter the staff's contact information to be visible only on internal sites. (Eide Web)

sub_fields.label: Office Extension Helper
sub_fields.message:
Extension Prefix
06xx 221
32xx 275
33xx 275
38xx No Direct Dial
39xx 292
48xx 679

65xx 444
66xx 444

95xx 271

sub_fields.label: Office Phone Area Code/Prefix
sub_fields.name: office_phone_prefix
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the direct office number area code/prefix. <small>Leave blank if no direct dial.</small>

sub_fields.label: Office Other Direct
sub_fields.name: office_other_direct
sub_fields.instructions: Enter a direct office phone number.

sub_fields.label: Office Tracking Number
sub_fields.name: office_phone_tracking
sub_fields.instructions: Enter a direct tracking number that routes to the direct office number.

sub_fields.label: Office Extension
sub_fields.name: office_extension
sub_fields.instructions: Enter direct extension. Leave blank if no extension.

sub_fields.label: Office Email
sub_fields.name: office_email
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the office email. Leave blank if no email

sub_fields.label: Cell #
sub_fields.name: office_cell_phone
sub_fields.instructions: Enter cell phone number without dashes or dots.

sub_fields.label: Cell # Visible
sub_fields.name: office_cell_phone_visible
sub_fields.instructions: Yes (Shown on internal listings) No (Hidden on listings but left in database)

sub_fields.label: SMS Communication
sub_fields.name: office_sms_status
sub_fields.instructions: Turn off will remove staff from any SMS communcation groups. Leave on by default.

sub_fields.label: Additional Numbers
sub_fields.name: additional_numbers
sub_fields.instructions: Add additional numbers for the staff to be reached at. Example: multiple locations, or multiple offices.

sub_fields.label: Type
sub_fields.name: type
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the type of additional number to list.

sub_fields.label: Label
sub_fields.name: phone_label
sub_fields.instructions:
Enter the label for the number. (listed to the left of the number)
Example: Home, Sales Desk, Office

sub_fields.label: Phone
sub_fields.name: phone
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the additional number to list.

sub_fields.label: Extension
sub_fields.name: extension
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the extension to list.

fields.label: Birthday
fields.name: birthday
fields.instructions: Choose the staff's birthday by choosing the birthday month and then the birthday day of the month.

sub_fields.label: Birthday Month
sub_fields.name: birthday_month
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the birthday month number.

sub_fields.label: Birthday Day
sub_fields.name: birthday_day
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the birthday day of the month.

fields.label: Managers Info
fields.message: The following fields pertain to the management and coaching relationships within this staff profile. The "Performance Manager" field identifies the coach assigned to the staff member. The "Assigned Staff" field, applicable to coach profiles, displays the list of staff members assigned to that coach for guidance and development.

fields.label: Performance Coach
fields.name: manager_performance_coach
fields.instructions: Who is this employees performance coach?

fields.label: Performance Coach - Staff Assignments
fields.name: manager_performance_coach_staff
fields.instructions: Lists all staff members assigned to this performance manager for coaching and development.

sub_fields.label: Display Screen Bottom Message
sub_fields.name: display_bottom_message
sub_fields.instructions: Enter any message to be displayed on the bottom of the staff card when displayed on store displays.
